summary.zh: 新增 Cmd+F 会话内查找，Markdown 阅读改为报纸式排版，工具调用卡片视觉更统一，会话列表和归档同步更稳定，底层 SDK 与模型词典同步升级。
summary.en: Added Cmd+F in-conversation find, switched Markdown reading to a newsprint-style layout, unified the look of tool-call cards, made session list and archive syncing more reliable, and upgraded the underlying SDK and model dictionary.

title.zh: 新增 Cmd+F 会话内查找

summary.zh: 可以在当前会话内按关键词查找命中消息，结果按消息级别定位，自动跳转并高亮最佳匹配位置。
summary.en: You can now search within the current conversation by keyword, with results resolved at the message level and the view jumping straight to the best match with highlighting.

details.zh: 会话列表的内容搜索命中也会直接跳转到匹配消息，而不只是切换到会话开头。
details.en: Content-search hits from the session list now jump to the matching message instead of just switching to the top of the conversation.

sources.title: feat(search): message-level find core with displayable-index semantics
feat(server): /api/sessions/find message-level hit route aligned with messages indexing
feat(chat): Cmd+F in-conversation find bar with whole-session hits
feat(sessions): content search hits jump to best-match message instead of bare switch
feat(chat): message locate consumption on surface with load-until-visible and find marks
fix(chat): find bar refocus-on-reopen and debounce close semantics
fix(chat): locate live-id messages via revision reconcile and scope find marks to message bodies

title.zh: 会话列表与归档同步更稳定
title.en: Session list and archive syncing are more reliable

summary.zh: 修复了单个会话条目异常会导致整个会话列表被清空的问题，以及远程客户端在会话归档后订阅静默断流的问题。
summary.en: Fixed an issue where a single broken session entry could clear the entire session list, and where remote clients would silently stop receiving updates after a session was archived.

details.zh: 会话归属判断统一收敛到 manifest 权威源，减少路径推导带来的边界情况。
details.en: Session ownership resolution is now consistently anchored to the manifest as the source of truth, reducing edge cases from path-based inference.

sources.title: fix(session): 列表链路单点失败不再清空整个会话列表
fix(ws): 远程客户端会话订阅按 sessionId 匹配，归档不再静默断流
fix(session): 新增 resolveSessionOwnership 归属边界，manifest.ownerAgentId 为权威
fix(session): coordinator 归属消费点收敛到 resolveSessionOwnership
fix(session): engine/server 基础层归属消费点收敛到 resolveSessionOwnership
fix(session): server routes 门禁与归属消费点收敛到 manifest 权威
fix(session): 启动 rescan 回填存量 manifest 缺失的 ownerAgentId（只补缺不覆盖）

title.zh: Markdown 阅读排版升级为报纸式版式
title.en: Markdown reading view adopts a newsprint-style layout

summary.zh: 引入 PT Serif 衬线字体与基线网格结构，表格和代码块的间距对齐阅读节奏，长文阅读更沉静统一。
summary.en: Introduces the PT Serif typeface and a baseline-grid structure, with tables and code blocks snapped to the reading rhythm for a calmer, more consistent long-form reading experience.

sources.title: feat(typography): PT Serif text-face token and radius-xs
feat(typography): markdown reading defaults switch to newsprint metrics
feat(preview): newsprint baseline-grid structure for markdown preview
feat(preview): rhythm snap for tables and code blocks
feat(design): fs-micro sixth type tier, dead space-token fix, token-reference guard

title.zh: 工具调用与子任务卡片视觉统一为「任务族」
title.en: Tool-call and subagent cards unified into a consistent "task family" look

summary.zh: 工具条、Subagent/Workflow 卡片收敛为统一的四角圆角矩形容器样式，深浅主题下的色阶层次更一致，视觉噪音更少。
summary.en: Tool bars and Subagent/Workflow cards now share a unified rounded-rectangle container style, with more consistent color depth across light and dark themes and less visual noise.

sources.title: feat(chat): ChatResourceCard 支持 task variant，Subagent/Workflow 卡收敛任务族容器
feat(design): --tool-bg 全主题加深一档，非任务语义借用点迁移 --overlay-subtle
feat(chat): 工具条收敛任务族形态——四角圆角矩形，去 accent 竖线与 accent 呼吸点
feat(chat): 任务族第二轮——底色中性化、连续 Subagent 卡融合、工具条对齐任务块宽度
fix(design): --tool-bg 亮色主题降至用户气泡同深度
fix(design): --tool-bg 对齐收纳条（各主题 --overlay-subtle 同值），收纳条 hover 迁 --overlay-light

title.zh: 底层 Pi SDK 升级，模型能力词典同步刷新
title.en: Underlying Pi SDK upgraded, model capability dictionary refreshed

summary.zh: 升级到 @earendil-works 维护的 Pi SDK 0.80.3，并同步刷新已知模型目录（含 MiniMax-M3 上下文窗口调整），模型可用性与能力信息更准确。
summary.en: Upgraded to Pi SDK 0.80.3 (now maintained under the @earendil-works scope) and refreshed the known-models catalog accordingly, including a context-window adjustment for MiniMax-M3, for more accurate model availability and capability info.

sources.title: feat(sdk): 升级 Pi SDK 至 @earendil-works 0.80.3（scope 迁移）
fix(models): 用 pi-ai 0.80.3 目录对表刷新 known-models 词典
fix(models): fallbacks 与词典对齐 + MiniMax-M3 context 用户策展 500k

title.zh: 为 Markdown 文档关联添加专属图标
title.en: Added a dedicated icon for Markdown document association

summary.zh: 在系统中用 Hana 打开 .md 文件时，会显示专属的文档图标而不是通用图标。
summary.en: Opening .md files with Hana now shows a dedicated document icon instead of a generic one.

sources.title: fix(packaging): add Markdown document icon assets
